content: {"body": "My experience spans end-to-end delivery leadership and technical program management across mission-critical programs. I built LLM evaluation stacks with Langfuse and Phoenix, delivered analytics applications with Next.js and Supabase, and cut evidence effort from roughly 3 hours to about 15 minutes per scenario while owning governance and change management.\n\nI would value the chance to discuss how my delivery and engineering experience maps to your team, and I am happy to meet for an interview whenever suits you."}
